chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 962 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 23-05-2023 Mr. Zahooruddin, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, APG a/w ASI G.M. Qadri, P.S. Gulshan-e- Maymar. ============= Omar Sial, J: Learned APG as well as the investigating officer of the case confirm that apart from suspicion shown on the applicant Muhammadullah by the complainant, the applicant was arrested. No other evidence has been found against him. Further, learned APG conforms that the applicant’s involvement in the case is similar to that of co-accused Samandar Khan, who has already been granted bail by this Court on 22.02.2023. In view of the foregoing, the case against the applicant is not only one of further inquiry but he is also entitled to the grant of post arrest bail on grounds of consistency. 2. The applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs. 200,000 and a P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial court. JUDGE
